title: Pronouncing Time and Age Exceptions
learningGoal: The learner will correctly pronounce time, age, and numbers, focusing entirely on avoiding common pronunciation mistakes with 4, 9, and 20.
instructions: Listen to the native speaker and repeat the words. In this activity, you will be heavily tested on the phonetic exceptions for 4 o'clock, 9 o'clock, and 20 years old.

contentItems.text: Saying 'yon-ji' instead of 'yo-ji' immediately marks you as a beginner. Practice these exceptions until they become automatic.

targetPhrasesOrWords.commonMispronunciation: Swallowing the 'i'. It must be two clear syllables before 'ji'.
Saying 'yon-ji'. NEVER say 'yon' when talking about time.
Saying 'ni-juu-sai'. 20 years old is always Hatachi.
Saying 'ichi-sai'. The 'chi' turns into a small pause (double consonant).
Skipping the 'u' sound. It is a long 'o' (yo-o-bi).
Using a hard 'n' sound. It's a soft nasal 'n'.

expectedPronunciationText: いちじ よじ くじ はたち いっさい げつようび すいようび なんじ

feedbackRules.onPass: Perfect! You correctly navigated the numerical exceptions.
feedbackRules.onFail: Try again. Remember: Yo-ji, Ku-ji, Hatachi.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good effort. Be careful with double consonants like in 'Issai'.

adminCorrectAnswerSet.exactCorrectTranscript: いちじ よじ くじ はたち いっさい げつようび すいようび なんじ
acceptedVariants: ichiji yoji kuji hatachi issai getsuyoubi suiyoubi nanji
adminCorrectAnswerSet.syllableSplitReference: i-chi-ji yo-ji ku-ji ha-ta-chi i-s-sa-i ge-tsu-yo-u-bi su-i-yo-u-bi na-n-ji
adminCorrectAnswerSet.phoneticApproximation: ee-chee-jee yoh-jee koo-jee hah-tah-chee ees-sai gets-yoh-bee soo-ee-yoh-bee nahn-jee
adminCorrectAnswerSet.nativeScriptReference: いちじ よじ くじ はたち いっさい げつようび すいようび なんじ
adminCorrectAnswerSet.transliteration: Ichi-ji Yo-ji Ku-ji Hatachi Issai Getsuyoubi Suiyoubi Nan-ji

audioAssets.audioTranscript: いちじ。よじ。くじ。はたち。いっさい。げつようび。すいようび。なんじ。

hintText: If you say 'Yon-ji', the system will mark it as incorrect. It must be 'Yo-ji'.
